title: TagValue
description: A tag value, which is a child of a tag key. Tag values are the specific labels that can be attached to resources through tag bindings.

name.description: The resource name of the tag value in the form tagValues/{tag_value_id}. Output only.

parent.description: The resource name of the parent tag key.

shortName.description: The user-friendly short name for the tag value. Unique for a given tag key. Maximum length of 256 characters.

namespacedName.description: The namespaced name of the tag value in the form {parentNamespace}/{shortName}. Output only.

description.description: User-assigned description of the tag value. Maximum length of 256 characters.

createTime.description: Timestamp when the tag value was created. Output only.

updateTime.description: Timestamp when the tag value was last modified. Output only.

etag.description: Entity tag for optimistic concurrency control.
